query:
SELECT 
  DATE(createdAt) as syncDate,
  COUNT(*) as totalRuns,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Partial' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as partialCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failedCount,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) as successRate
FROM syncCheckpoints
WHERE createdAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 4 DAY)
GROUP BY DATE(createdAt)
ORDER BY syncDate DESC;
